task_completion.description: Verify that the agent configures a new device adapter by selecting the 'Simulated' category and 'Multiparameter Monitor' type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the 'Create an ICE Device Adapter' window with 'Simulated' selected in the category list and 'Multiparameter Monitor' selected in the type list.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent starts the configured device adapter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent clicking the 'Start' button in the device adapter creation window.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Multiparameter Monitor device appears in the Devices panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a device icon representing the Multiparameter Monitor visible in the Devices panel on the right side of the OpenICE interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent opens the device details view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent clicking the device icon in the Devices panel, resulting in the opening of a detailed view specific to the Multiparameter Monitor.

task_completion.description: Verify that vital sign waveforms and numeric values are displayed in the device details view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the device details view showing active waveforms (ECG, SpO2 plethysmograph) and numeric data (heart rate, blood pressure, oxygen saturation) being rendered on the screen.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenICE GUI to view the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenICE graphical user interface being interacted with, rather than just terminal outputs, scripts, or API calls to fetch the data.

integrity.description: Verify the actual OpenICE application is used.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window matches the standard OpenICE interface, not a text editor, image viewer, or web search displaying mock data.

integrity.description: Verify the vital signs data is rendered by the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The waveforms and numeric values appear within the application's native graphing and UI components, not as pasted text or static images.
